Coverage Report
===============

.. note::
   Coverage is automatically calculated from the test suite on each documentation build.

.. raw:: html

   <div style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; margin: 20px 0;">
       <iframe src="../_static/coverage/index.html"
               style="width: 100%; height: 800px; border: none;"
               title="Coverage Report">
       </iframe>
   </div>

   <p>If the coverage report doesn't display above, 
   <a href="../_static/coverage/index.html" target="_blank">open it in a new tab</a>.</p>
